package rulecoverage

func NegativeTxWithoutRollbackGuard() string {
    ruleID := "tx_without_rollback_guard"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Transactions begun and later committed with no observed rollback guard."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
